subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of tribulation, from God, thy Lord, the Most Exalted, the All-Glorious: "Verily, I am God, there is no god..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء من شطر البلاء من الله ربک العلی الابهی انی انا الله لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
